changes: Replaced Python code examples with JavaScript (native to opencode+bun runtime, no numpy dependency)
Added explicit per-unit conversion (BASE_MVA=100) for DC power flow to fix angle magnitudes
Added Gaussian elimination with partial pivoting for solving linear system in JavaScript
Increased binary search iterations to 500 with tighter tolerance (1e-10) for economic dispatch
Added explicit rounding (1e6) to avoid floating-point noise in dispatch output
Added stronger emphasis on using JavaScript code templates directly
Added common mistake entry about using Python when JS is available

notes.economic-dispatch_within-limits: The within-limits criterion has a testPattern bug: pattern 'within limits' does not match test name 'all generators within min/max limits' (regex fails due to 'min/max' between 'within' and 'limits'). This makes the criterion impossible to pass, capping the maximum achievable score at 80/100.
